title.en: Among them are the two treasures of the Celesti...

content.en:
Rumble!!!!

The Snow Maiden's controller herself seemed to have turned into a change in the Dao, and countless changes in the Dao emerged, enveloping the Origin Void of this Boundary River.

Under the suppression of the origin of the Snow Maiden's controller, the Boundary River Void gradually stabilized, and under the influence of its own Dao Origin, the Boundary River Origin is deriving its own Boundary River Origin.

And this process is also an opportunity that belongs to the Snow Maiden's own controller, she can understand the origin of the boundary river more clearly, and there are still many benefits.

Meanwhile.

The Snow Maiden also took out treasures and integrated them into the boundary river to accelerate the evolution of the boundary river.

Among them are the two treasures of the Celestial Stone and the Thousand Clouds.

These two treasures are the treasures that the Snow Maiden's master has obtained from the auction, which can increase the success rate of opening up the boundary river.

At this time, these two treasures, along with some other treasures, merged into the Boundary River Void one after another, accelerating the evolution of the Boundary River.

The rules of the boundary river are being born and improved step by step.

I saw that some boundary river islands were gradually born in this boundary river, many secret places, and even whirlpools appeared in many places, which was the prototype of the eternal realm.

The Eternal Realm is an important symbol of a Boundary River, and it is also a very important foundation.

Although there are not many Eternal Masters born in the Eternal Realm, there is still a lot of potential, and many of the top Eternal Masters have almost grown up from the Eternal Realm.

For example, Ye Tian is!

......

"The Dao created by the Fourth Senior Sister is really inclined to the Dao of Ice, it should be based on the Dao of Ice, supplemented by the Dao of Time and Space, etc., and finally created a Dao!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Moreover, when the Snow Maiden was in control of the boundary river, he could obviously sense the many changes in the fourth senior sister's doorway.

"Not only hundreds of millions of changes, but more than hundreds of millions of changes, at least 300 million changes !!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The self-created path has mastered 300 million changes of the path, which is not easy.

Mastering the changes of 300 million paths is many times more difficult than mastering the changes of multiple 100 million paths.

"No wonder among so many Nine Realm-level controllers, only the Fourth Senior Sister dares to open up the Boundary River and impact the Ten Realm-level Controllers, it seems that the strength of the Fourth Senior Sister is definitely one of the best among the Nine Realm-level controllers!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

At this time.

Many eternal masters are watching the Snow Maiden master open up the boundary river, which is equivalent to learning experience, maybe he will also have the hope of opening up the boundary river in the future, so understand it yourself, and you will have a number in the future.

Time passed slowly, and before I knew it, ten years had passed.

Many of the Eternal Masters are gone, leaving only one avatar behind, after all, many of the Eternal Masters don't want to waste too much time here.

"The fourth senior sister has passed the most dangerous time and space, and it is basically stable!"

The Black Decay Controller said suddenly.

"Yes, the fourth senior sister will definitely be able to open up the Boundary River this time, and in the near future, she can officially use the power of the Boundary River to break the shackles and impact the Ten Realm-level controllers, and our Origin Realm Sea will have one more Ten-Realm level controller, and Wanyuan Mountain will also have one more Ten-Realm level controller!" said the Ancient Demon Controller happily.

"Envy the fourth junior sister!"

Senior Brother Jiang You said lightly.

Another period of time has passed, and at this time, the boundary river can already operate freely, and there is no need for the Snow Maiden to take care of it.

Thereupon.

The Snow Maiden Controller flew out of this future Eighty-Nine Boundary River and landed in front of Ye Tian and the others.

"Three senior brothers, Senior Brother Ye Tian, thank you for your support!"

The Snow Maiden Master thanked.

"Hahaha, we didn't help much, and no one dared to sabotage your opening up of the Boundary River!" said the Ancient Demon Master.

Afterwards, the Snow Maiden controller chatted with Ye Tian and the four of them for a while, and then returned to the Eighty-ninth Boundary River.

Although she doesn't need to take care of it, she is also afraid of unexpected situations, so she still needs to guard the eighty-ninth boundary river.

After another period of time, the Eighty-Nine Boundary River has completely stabilized, just like the real Boundary River, except that there are fewer resources, and it is very empty, and there are no living beings.

"Let's go to the Eighty-Nine Boundary River of the Fourth Senior Sister and have a look!"

The Black Decay Controller took the lead, and Ye Tian followed him and entered the Eighty-Ninth Boundary River.

At this time, the Ancient Demon Controller said, "In the Eighty-Nine Boundary River, the four junior sisters can now exert the combat power of a nearly ten-level master!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly, the boundary river can increase the strength of the creator, he knows it.

This is the home of the Snow Maiden's master, and even if it is a ten-realm level master, it will take some effort to defeat the Snow Maiden controller here.

At this time, the Snow Maiden Controller opened up a void in the Eighty-ninth Boundary River as his residence.

At the same time, the Snow Maiden Controller also invited a group of friends to participate in her great event of opening up the Boundary River.

Ye Tian also participated in this banquet to celebrate the Snow Maiden's successful opening up of the Boundary River.

Soon after.

The Snow Maiden Controller is ready to attack the Ten Realm-level Controllers, and using the Boundary River to attack the Ten Realm-level Controllers is not something that a kid can break through, and it will take a long time.

Therefore, for a long period of time in the future, the Snow Maiden controller will probably be in a state of retreat.

The Black Decay Controller and the Ancient Demon Controller will not come to disturb the Snow Maiden Controller, and they all leave one by one.

And Ye Tian also left the Eighty-ninth Boundary River and went to Taichu Mountain again.

He continued to practice here in the Primordial Source Tree, mastering the changes of the Endless Dao, even if the Primordial Origin Tree did not help him too much, but at least it was helpful.

Therefore, it is also good to be able to save time in practice.

Time flies.

Unconsciously, hundreds of millions of years have passed.

At this time, a message came.

The Snow Maiden Controller has officially broken through to the Ten Realms Controllers level, but it will continue to improve for a long time, because it has just broken through to the Ten Realms Masters, and there is still a period of rapid improvement, so the Snow Girl Controllers will not be out of the level at this time.

Therefore, Ye Tian did not bother the fourth senior sister Snow Girl in control.

"I have also mastered nearly 100 million changes in the Endless Dao, and after a period of enlightenment, I can completely integrate the origin of the Endless Dao into the origin of the Origin Realm Sea, absorb the origin of the Origin Realm Sea, and absorb the power of the Origin Realm Sea to refine my body at all times!"

Ye Tian muttered.
